subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! In the embrace of Thy providence have they been nurtured and grown through Thine ancient grace, and we are helpless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی آغوش عنایتده پرورش فیض قدیمکله نشو و نما بولمش و بیچارگانز و هر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for children and youth, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @education of children; moral education
